name: template-review
description: Review the deliverable (breadth then depth) and fix findings until no Blocker/Major remains. RENAME to <prefix>-review.
rubric: The breadth pass scanned the current draft for missing sections and internal inconsistency.
The depth pass returned an explicit verdict for each of the five gates.
The deterministic checks (the validate loop) are green.
The output is consistent with the stated objective/mandate.
fixPrompt: Each iteration: (1) breadth-review the deliverable for completeness and consistency; (2) depth-review by issuing a verdict on each gate in gates.md; (3) if no Blocker/Major findings remain and the validate loop is green, converge; (4) otherwise fix the findings and re-run the validate checks before the next pass.
guardrails: Findings are fixed, not argued away.
Do not weaken the deliverable to clear a gate.
Re-review the fixes themselves each iteration.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the remaining Blocker/Major findings and recommend human review or a return to the Plan stage.
